title: Create: Northstarmaps
description: A CIT resource pack for Create: Northstar that retextures Star Map and Astronomical Reading textures so they are (Somewhat) distinguishable
body:
A CIT resource pack for Create: Northstar that retextures Star Map and Astronomical Reading textures so they are (Somewhat) distinquishable.

It adds color coded textures based on the designation of celestial body, and an icon of the celestial body itself.

**Requires [CIT Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/citreforged)**

## Currenty has textures for Astronomical Readings/Star Maps of
- Yellow (Planet): Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars
- Gray (Moon): Moon
- Red (Gas Giant): Jupiter
- Orange (Dwarf Planet): Ceres, Pluto, Eris
- Cyan: (Ice Giant): Uranus, Neptune
## How did you make it?
Just took the book/reading texture, recolored it, and slapped the planets from Create: Northstar onto it (Some editing has done to fit it on the book/reading)

[Create: Northstar](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-northstar) [Discord](https://discord.gg/maGyfXuGMA)
